summary: Tested Blog UI (admin + therapist) and Slot system. All 14 backend tests pass. All frontend flows verified.

minor.issue: No endpoint for single article GET (returns 405). Not exposed in UI so no impact, but worth noting for future API completeness.

critical_code_review_comments: No GET /api/blog/{id} endpoint - admin and therapist pages use list endpoint. Consider adding for future article preview API or public blog page.

Therapist shows edit button on own articles (In Revisione) - edit allowed, good. Published articles only show delete - minor: therapist cannot edit published article even if they want to correct a typo.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_UI articles during testing (cleanup: TEST_UI Articolo Admin published, TEST_UI Articolo Terapeuta in revisione, TEST_Da Rifiutare published - left in DB)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Blog UI fully tested: admin CRUD, approve/reject, filters all work. Therapist write/submit flow works with 'In Revisione' status. Approval info banner shown. Slot API returns ~52 slots for demo therapist with Italian date format. All data-testid attributes present and functional.

test_results.admin_blog_page: PASS - loads with all 4 filters (Tutti/In Revisione/Pubblicati/Rifiutati)
test_results.admin_create_article: PASS - modal form works, article appears as Pubblicato
test_results.admin_approve: PASS - approve button changes status to Pubblicato
test_results.therapist_blog_page: PASS - loads with Scrivi Articolo button
test_results.therapist_submit_article: PASS - article appears as In Revisione with success banner
test_results.therapist_approval_banner: PASS - info banner about review process visible
test_results.slots_italian_format: PASS - data_ora_fmt contains Italian day names
